facebook.content:
"And he gave some, apostles; and some, prophets; and some, evangelists; and some, pastors and teachers; 

For the equipping of the saints for the work of ministry, for the edifying of the body of Christ."

(Ephesians 4:11-12)

We need these spiritual gifts in our lives, brothers and sisters. They're not just for the leaders or the special ones. They're for every believer, every child of God.

What spiritual gift do you sense the Lord has given you to equip others?

#KingdomOfGod #Jesus #JesusIsLord
facebook.pullQuote: They're for every believer, every child of God.

instagram.content:
"Jesus came to his hometown, and they put faith to the test... 

Is anyone willing to take a step of faith in Jesus' name?

For he said to them, "A prophet is not respected in his hometown." (Luke 4:24)

What does it mean for you to take a stand for Jesus in your own town? #IFMBlessed #JesusLordship #KingdomAuthority"
